creator: gonzo@FreeBSD.org
text:
This looks like a bug in upstream. Dates order in sources is opposite:

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/head/include/protocols/dumprestore.h?revision=326024&view=markup#l83
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/head/include/protocols/dumprestore.h?revision=326024&view=markup#l83
https://sourceforge.net/p/dump/code/ci/master/tree/compat/include/protocols/dumprestore.h#l90

I just sent a patch (attached) to file(1) developer.
